race.comment: PULA (8) is knocking on the door and gets her chance. She's placed in all three runs this time in, just finding an in-form mare a touch too strong at Sandown Hillside last start. 1500m here looks ideal, she lands in a good spot and can get the job done. SIMPLY OUTRAGEOUS (9) was a dominant winner fresh, good up to this grade at Pakenham last time when getting into third. She can improve again and take holding out. VIANARRA (2) is going well, not all that far away in a tougher race last time. Her form prior has her as a leading chance. BIRDIE TIME (6) resumes for her first run in Australia, now with the Hayes yard. She'll likely want further but respect any move. MAHERS LANDING (7) next best.
